name: rehab/signs-grid
title: Signs grid (checklist)
description: Two checklist cards (e.g. Signs / Withdrawal symptoms) followed by an optional dark CTA bar.

eyebrow.default: Is it time to consider rehab?

heading.default: Recognise the signs of cocaine addiction

subheading.default: Acknowledging the signs is the first step towards recovery — for yourself or for someone you love.

ctaTitle.default: If any of this feels familiar, please reach out.
